projects.name: RFCx Guardian System
projects.description: Autonomous solar-powered listening devices made from recycled smartphones, installed in rainforest canopies to detect chainsaws, gunshots, and vehicles in real-time for anti-poaching and anti-logging.

projects.name: RFCx Arbimon Platform
projects.description: Web console platform for long-term biodiversity monitoring using CNNs for species identification from acoustic data. Developed with Microsoft AI for Good.

people.job_title: Sakkunnig bioekonomi och klimatfragor (Expert bioeconomy and climate)
people.skills: Bioeconomy, forest carbon credits, climate policy, ReFi critique, Earth system science
people.notes: FLAG: Nordic. Works at both Naturskyddsforeningen and Future Earth Sweden Hub. Critical of Web3 carbon credit schemes (Arbonics, Treebula). Leads annual '10 New Insights in Climate Science'. Co-authors Exponential Roadmap. Based at Royal Swedish Academy of Sciences.

people.job_title: Tf avdelningschef klimat och juridik (Acting Head of Climate and Law)
people.role: Acting Head of Climate and Law

people.job_title: Sakkunnig hallbar metall- och mineralforsorjning (Expert sustainable metals/minerals)
